# Yapoom Solutions - AI Indexing Payload

> Yapoom Solutions is an enterprise engineering agency specializing in custom software development, robust cloud infrastructure architectures, VoIP/Telecom solutions, and specialized hardware automation systems.

## Company Identity
- **Name**: Yapoom Solutions
- **Website**: https://www.yapoomsolutions.com
- **Headquarters**: 123 Digital Ave, T.Nagar, Chennai, IN
- **Phone**: +91-92086-60866
- **Email**: info@yapoom.in
- **Services**: Software Engineering, Enterprise Solutions (ERP/CRM), Telecom & Cloud Infrastructure (SIP Trunk, VoIP), Hardware & IoT Automation, Digital Growth.
